seed_instruction: Design a 7-day road trip itinerary across the US West Coast. Include major cities, national parks, and activities for each day, along with estimated driving distances.
org_constraint: The response must contain exactly 14 sentences.
new_constraint: The response must contain at least 21 sentences.
instruction: Design a 7-day road trip itinerary across the US West Coast. Include major cities, national parks, and activities for each day, along with estimated driving distances. The response must contain exactly 14 sentences. The response must contain at least 21 sentences.
response: Embark on an epic 7-day West Coast road trip starting in San Francisco, California. Day 1 involves driving south from San Francisco towards Monterey, allowing time to explore Cannery Row. The estimated drive is around 120 miles. Day 2 brings you to Big Sur, where stunning coastal drives and photo opportunities await near Pfeiffer Big Sur State Park. Plan for a leisurely pace here, as the scenery demands attention. Day 3 takes you further south to San Diego, California, a city famous for its beaches and relaxed vibe. The drive on this day is approximately 150 miles. Day 4 is dedicated to exploring Joshua Tree National Park, a unique desert landscape near Palm Springs. This day involves minimal driving, focusing on hiking and stargazing within the park boundaries. Estimated driving time for this day is less than 30 miles to the park entrance. Day 5 requires a substantial drive up through the Sierra Nevada mountains towards Yosemite National Park in California. This longest driving day covers roughly 350 miles. Day 6 is spent immersed in Yosemite Valley, enjoying iconic views of El Capitan and Half Dome. Allocate the entire day for hiking or valley floor exploration. Finally, Day 7 involves driving from Yosemite, perhaps cutting across into Northern California or a final leg towards Los Angeles, depending on your departure city. The driving distance for this final leg is variable but significant. This itinerary balances urban exploration with breathtaking natural wonders. Remember to book accommodations well in advance, especially near national parks. Pack layers, as coastal weather can change rapidly. Enjoy the incredible diversity of landscapes along this phenomenal journey.<turn|>
final_answer: Embark on an epic 7-day West Coast road trip starting in San Francisco, California. Day 1 involves driving south from San Francisco towards Monterey, allowing time to explore Cannery Row. The estimated drive is around 120 miles. Day 4 is dedicated to exploring Joshua Tree National Park, a unique desert landscape near Palm Springs. Finally, Day 7 involves driving from Yosemite, perhaps cutting across into Northern California or a final leg towards Los Angeles, depending on your departure city. Remember to book accommodations well in advance, especially near national parks. Pack layers, as coastal weather can change rapidly. Enjoy the incredible diversity of landscapes along this phenomenal journey.<turn|>
